name: Kamisado
author: Peter Burley (2008), GameWright/Huch! / AGP port
description: Kamisado (Peter Burley, 2008). An 8x8 board where every cell is one of 8 colours in a fixed symmetric Latin-square pattern. Each player has 8 towers, one of each colour, on their home row. Towers move straight or diagonally FORWARD over empty cells. The colour of the cell a tower lands on dictates which colour tower the opponent must move next (the colour chain); the first move is free. If the required tower is blocked the turn passes back and the obligation bounces to the colour the blocked tower stands on. Win by moving a tower onto the opponent's home row. This package implements the base single-round game (not the match / Sumo scoring variants).
